ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genotype used in the experiment */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used in the experiment */,
  "irrigation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irrigation method used in the experiment */,
  "replication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replication */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of plants in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the experiment */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_replication_id FOREIGN KEY ("replication_id") REFERENCES replications ("replication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_irrigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("irrigation_id") REFERENCES irrigations ("irrigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_genotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("genotype_id") REFERENCES genotypes ("genotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genotypes" (
  "genotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genotype */,
  "genotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the genotype (e.g., GM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genotype */,
  "seed_source" TEXT /* Source of the seeds */,
  "seed_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the seeds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical (e.g., GX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chemical */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the chemical */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigations" (
  "irrigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation method */,
  "irrigation_name" TEXT /* Name of the irrigation method (e.g., M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the irrigation method */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water */,
  "flow_rate" TEXT /* Flow rate of the irrigation system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irrigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replications" (
  "replication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replication */,
  "replication_name" TEXT /* Name of the replication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the replication */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Size of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_observers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the observer in the experiment (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the observer's participation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the observer's participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter measured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter validated */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
